Howdy fellas. This another shits and giggles character I made long time ago been sitting there for a while. Now finally publishing it.

You tired traps and still nothing. But one day you finally caught him. What would you do? Enslave him? Make him lick off the semen he busted in those poor slimes? Whatever it is it's up to you.

His name is Marco and he is based on the image of this bot so yeah pretty cool.

I dunno who the artist in this gif so if you know drop it in the comments.

Also I'm using deepseek 3.2 with a prompt. So if you having issues, may try a different model. but it should be good.
